title: Roasted Sweet Chinese Mushroom Stir-fry
description: A sweet, crispy one-pot dish featuring katsuramuki-cut mushrooms, whole30-friendly seasonings, and a caramelized glaze.
instructions: In a bowl, combine mushrooms with 2 tbsp olive oil, minced garlic, minced ginger, 2 tbsp tamari, 1 tbsp apple juice, and a pinch of salt, then toss until coated.
Spread the mushrooms in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment.
Roast for 15 minutes, flipping halfway through, until edges start to caramelize.
While mushrooms roast, heat a small pan over medium heat and roast the remaining garlic and ginger for 1 minute until fragrant.
Remove mushrooms from oven and add them to the pan along with sliced scallions, tossing everything until scallions soften.
Sprinkle 1 tsp sesame seeds over the stir‑fry and give a final toss.
Serve hot, optionally garnishing with extra scallions.
